response.title: Senior Retail Manager
response.description: We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Retail Manager to lead our retail operations team. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of driving sales growth, enhancing customer experiences, and managing large teams effectively. You will be responsible for developing strategic initiatives, overseeing store performance, and ensuring operational excellence across multiple locations.

required_skills: Minimum 7 years of experience in retail management
Proven ability to develop and implement sales strategies that drive growth
Expertise in inventory management techniques and tools
Strong analytical skills to assess store performance metrics
Experience in leading large teams (50+ employees) with a focus on staff development
Proficiency in retail management software (e.g., POS systems, CRM tools)
Ability to create and manage budgets and financial forecasts
Knowledge of visual merchandising principles and best practices
preferred_skills: Experience with e-commerce platforms and integration with physical stores
Familiarity with customer relationship management strategies
Experience with in-store technology solutions (e.g., mobile payments, digital signage)
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Retail Management, or related field
